patient_summary: 73-year-old female (DOB 05/05/1952). Active problem list documents include: Mixed dyslipidemia - Primary; Essential hypertension, benign; Postoperative anemia; Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus (CMS/HCC). Major upcoming procedure: COLONOSCOPY, WITH BIOPSY scheduled 02/21/2025 with Haroon, Mustafa, MD. Notable laboratory findings: Ferritin 266.8 (H) (07/03/2023), Iron 41 (L) (07/03/2023), eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) (07/03/2023), Triglycerides 158 (H) (07/03/2023). Multiple care teams documented including Hand, Hoyet A, MD (PCP), Kandaswamy, Shankar, MD (Pulmonary), and Darlington, Andrew, DO (Cardiology). Conflicting social and functional status documentation exists across source records (smoking status; activities of daily living).
